meaning: n.连络用对讲电话装置,内部通信联络系统
examples: He pushed a button on the intercom. "Yes?" came a voice.
The intercom buzzed and he pressed down the appropriate switch.
I pushed a button on my intercom and told Viktor Ilyushin that I needed to see him.
We were returning from an afternoon safari when the first bell buzzed over the intercom.
Passers-by have been able to communicate with them through the window using an intercom.
